title: FCDO statement on DPRK ballistic missile launch: 7 November
body: "An FCDO spokesperson said:   We are concerned by reports that North Korea conducted a further ballistic missile launch on 7 November.  Ballistic missile launches violate multiple UN Security Council resolutions (UNSCRs) and destabilise peace and security on the Korean Peninsula.  The UK continues to urge North Korea to cease provocations, to engage in meaningful diplomacy and accept offers of dialogue.    Media enquiries     Email newsdesk@fcdo.gov.uk     Telephone 020 7008 3100    Email the FCDO Newsdesk (monitored 24 hours a day) in the first instance, and we will respond as soon as possible.   "
